message:
fix(daemon): respect rigs filter in patrol config

The daemon was ignoring the rigs field in daemon.json patrol config,
causing it to start witness/refinery for ALL rigs instead of only
the configured ones. This caused sky to keep restarting even though
it should stay docked.

- Add Rigs []string field to PatrolConfig struct
- Add GetPatrolRigs() helper to extract rigs from config
- Add getPatrolRigs() Daemon method that falls back to all rigs
- Update ensureWitnessesRunning/ensureRefineriesRunning to use filter

Fixes: gt-owxh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
